overview: This appears to be a Coastal Tailed Frog (Ascaphus truei), characterized by its dark, mottled skin and rough texture. These frogs are well-adapted to rocky streams and are known to live in water year-round. The species often hides under rocks and logs in its habitat to avoid predators. This appears to be a Coastal Tailed Frog (Ascaphus truei), characterized by its dark, mottled skin and rough texture.
These frogs are well-adapted to rocky streams and are known to live in water year-round.
The species often hides under rocks and logs in its habitat to avoid predators.
